summary: Validated new pricing engine + live quote + bundle-aware exports + copy-protection. Backend: 23/23 tests PASS (12 unit + 11 integration). Frontend: all 7 UI flows PASS across non-Pro and Pro paths. No blocking issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: pricing.py is clean, pure (no I/O), fully unit-tested, single source of truth for constants. Good separation of concerns.
purchase-single correctly ignores any client-supplied amount and re-prices on the server via calculate_quote() using DesignParams + simple_nesting — verified via integration test.
exports/generate honours bundle (full_pack returns dxf+svg+gcode+pdf, dxf returns only dxf) and download endpoint returns 404 for excluded file types — both verified.
DeskPreview3D applies diagonal watermark with email-based text for non-Pro users only — visually confirmed via screenshots (non-Pro shows watermark, Pro admin clean).

server.py is 1700+ lines — nearing the 700-line split threshold from code-review guidelines; consider splitting exports_router and pricing_router into their own modules for maintainability (non-blocking).
Webhook error path returns {received: true, error: ...} with 200 — Stripe prefers non-200 for failure so it retries; consider propagating non-2xx (non-blocking, works for test mode).
check-access returns has_access:false with 200 (not 401) when unauthenticated — this is intentional UX and matches the spec.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_*@example.com users registered during testing. payment_transactions docs created by purchase-single test. exports docs created by Pro generate tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing engine is solid and fully covered by tests. Auth is cookie-based — use requests.Session() and login/register to get a session, do NOT look for access_token in login JSON. All 4 bundle keys are: dxf, dxf_svg, dxf_gcode, full_pack. Live quote endpoint /api/pricing/quote is intentionally unauthenticated. Watermark email text is set via user.email (falls back to 'UltimateDesk — preview only').

features_tested.GET /api/pricing/bundles: PASS - returns 4 bundles (dxf, dxf_svg, dxf_gcode, full_pack) with multipliers, files, and pricing constants
features_tested.POST /api/pricing/quote (small office dx: PASS - total $14-22, headline contains size+desk+sheet+$ NZD
features_tested.POST /api/pricing/quote (large studio fu: PASS - commercial_fee $19, bundle upgrade line item, bundle_files=[dxf,svg,gcode,pdf]
features_tested.POST /api/exports/purchase-single (fresh: PASS - returns stripe.com URL, session_id, server-computed amount > $30
features_tested.POST /api/exports/generate full_pack (ad: PASS - returns files dict with dxf+svg+gcode+pdf keys
features_tested.GET /api/exports/download/{id}/{type} in: PASS - 200 for dxf/svg/gcode/pdf when in bundle
features_tested.Pricing page UI: PASS - 'Per-Design Export' card shows 'from $14 NZD', CTA 'Design & See My Price', no $4.99 anywhere
features_tested.Designer live-price-pill (non-Pro): PASS - shows 'from $20 NZD' in header, updates on param change
features_tested.ExportDialog bundle-selector: PASS - 4 options rendered with data-testid bundle-opt-{key}
features_tested.ExportDialog live-quote-card: PASS - line items + total render, headline shown
features_tested.ExportDialog non-Pro shows checkout-btn: PASS - label 'Pay $49 NZD and download', no generate-export-btn
features_tested.ExportDialog Pro shows generate-export-b: PASS - label 'Generate files (Pro, included)', no checkout-btn
features_tested.ExportDialog Pro generate -> download bu: PASS - download-dxf/svg/gcode/pdf-btn all present after generation
features_tested.DeskPreview3D watermark non-Pro: PASS - diagonal email-based watermark painted across canvas (verified via screenshot)
features_tested.DeskPreview3D no watermark for Pro: PASS - clean preview for admin (verified via screenshot)
